DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.4: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Status mask.comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

VIN.CRC.comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

RenaultID.DiagnosticIdentificationCode.comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

RenaultID.HardwareNumberLowerPart.comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

RenaultID.SoftwareNumber.comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

RenaultID.EditionNumber.comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

VIN.VIN.comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

NissanID.DiagnosticIdentificationCode.comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

NissanID.EditionNumber.comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

NissanID.HardwareNumberLowerPart.comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

NissanID.SoftwareNumber.comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

lists.17: Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)
Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)

ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigura.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)

VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)

lists.0: Disable (Drive and Reverse mode emit different sounds)
lists.1: Enable (Drive and Reverse mode emit the same sound)

VSP Configuration Parameters1.DR_REV_IDE.comment: Identical sound on Drive and Reverse status

lists.0: Disable (Mute function with switch is not available)
lists.1: Enable    (Mute function with switch is available)

VSP Configuration Parameters1.DEFAULT_SO.comment: Default sound on Drive and Reverse

SOUND_DELAY_CF.ICONIC_SOUND_DELAY_CF.comment: delay between the reception of request and emission of sound (to synchronize with flashing lights)

SOUND_DELAY_CF.CAR_FINDER_SOUND_DELAY_CF.comment: delay between the reception of request and emission of sound (to synchronize with flashing lights)

lists.0: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures  masked
lists.1: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked

lists.2: Play Admit to charge battery sound request
lists.3: Play Unlock charging plug sound request

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

VIN.comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
